2026-03-03FAOther Than Statutory AuthorityAppointment of the Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to the French RepublicAppointment of Nathalie G. subject: Appointment of the Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to the French Republic
precis: Appointment of Nathalie G. Drouin of Gatineau, Quebec as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to the French Republic, effective March 23, 2026.
